title: Finn's Safari Adventure
synopsis: A young boy named Finn embarks on an exciting safari adventure, meeting friendly animals and discovering the wonders of the savanna while learning about friendship and courage.

pages.text: Finn was so excited! Today he was going on a big safari adventure. He put on his safari hat and grabbed his binoculars. 'I'm going to see so many animals!' he said happily.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a young boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes wearing a safari hat and holding binoculars, standing in front of a safari jeep with warm savanna colors and golden grass in the background
illustration.alt: Finn ready for safari adventure with hat and binoculars

pages.text: The safari jeep bumped along the dusty path. Finn looked everywhere with his binoculars. The golden grass swayed in the warm breeze. Where were all the animals hiding?

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene with bold confident strokes showing a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes sitting in a safari jeep looking through binoculars, surrounded by warm savanna colors and golden grass fields under an orange sunset sky
illustration.alt: Finn in safari jeep searching for animals with binoculars

pages.text: Suddenly, Finn heard a loud trumpet sound! A big gray elephant was splashing in the water hole. 'Hello there!' called Finn. The elephant waved his trunk and sprayed cool water everywhere.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with expressive animals and thick brushstrokes showing a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving at a friendly gray elephant splashing water at a watering hole, painted in warm savanna colors with golden grass and orange sunset tones
illustration.alt: Finn greeting a friendly elephant at the watering hole

pages.text: Next, Finn spotted tall giraffes eating leaves from the trees. Their long necks stretched way up high! A baby giraffe peeked out from behind its mama and gave Finn a shy smile.

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene with bold confident strokes depicting a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes looking up at tall giraffes with expressive faces, painted in warm savanna colors with golden grass and acacia trees against an orange sunset sky
illustration.alt: Finn watching giraffes eating from tall trees

pages.text: As the sun began to set, painting the sky orange and pink, Finn saw zebras galloping across the grassland. Their black and white stripes looked like moving artwork!

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watching zebras galloping across golden grass, painted in warm savanna colors with an orange sunset sky and bold confident painterly strokes
illustration.alt: Finn watching zebras run across the savanna at sunset

pages.text: 'What a wonderful day!' said Finn as they drove back home. He had made so many new animal friends on his safari adventure. He couldn't wait to tell everyone about his exciting day!

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene with expressive animals and thick brushstrokes showing a happy boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes in the safari jeep waving goodbye to various safari animals silhouetted against an orange sunset sky, painted in warm savanna colors with golden grass
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to his animal friends at the end of his safari

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What did Finn use to look for animals?
questions.explanation: Finn used binoculars to search for animals on his safari adventure.

questions.question: Which animal splashed water at the watering hole?
questions.explanation: The big gray elephant was splashing in the water hole and sprayed cool water everywhere.

questions.question: What were the giraffes doing?
questions.explanation: The tall giraffes were eating leaves from the trees with their long necks stretched up high.

questions.question: When did Finn see the zebras?
questions.explanation: Finn saw the zebras galloping as the sun began to set, painting the sky orange and pink.
